2026-02-27T12:33:55.0237882Z ##[group]Run set -eo pipefail
2026-02-27T12:33:55.0238224Z [36;1mset -eo pipefail[0m
2026-02-27T12:33:55.0238471Z [36;1mmkdir -p /tmp/gh-aw/mcp-config[0m
2026-02-27T12:33:55.0238727Z [36;1m[0m
2026-02-27T12:33:55.0239036Z [36;1m# Export gateway environment variables for MCP config and gateway script[0m
2026-02-27T12:33:55.0239443Z [36;1mexport MCP_GATEWAY_PORT="80"[0m
2026-02-27T12:33:55.0239761Z [36;1mexport MCP_GATEWAY_DOMAIN="host.docker.internal"[0m
2026-02-27T12:33:55.0240151Z [36;1mMCP_GATEWAY_API_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-02-27T12:33:55.0240541Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${MCP_GATEWAY_API_KEY}"[0m
2026-02-27T12:33:55.0240826Z [36;1mexport MCP_GATEWAY_API_KEY[0m
2026-02-27T12:33:55.0241167Z [36;1mexport MCP_GATEWAY_PAYLOAD_DIR="/tmp/gh-aw/mcp-payloads"[0m
2026-02-27T12:33:55.0241529Z [36;1mmkdir -p "${MCP_GATEWAY_PAYLOAD_DIR}"[0m
2026-02-27T12:33:55.0241798Z [36;1mexport DEBUG="*"[0m
2026-02-27T12:33:55.0242007Z [36;1m[0m
2026-02-27T12:33:55.0242196Z [36;1mexport GH_AW_ENGINE="copilot"[0m
2026-02-27T12:33:55.0246401Z [36;1mexport MCP_GATEWAY_DOCKER_COMMAND='docker run -i --rm --network host -v /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock -e MCP_GATEWAY_PORT -e MCP_GATEWAY_DOMAIN -e MCP_GATEWAY_API_KEY -e MCP_GATEWAY_PAYLOAD_DIR -e DEBUG -e MCP_GATEWAY_LOG_DIR -e GH_AW_MCP_LOG_DIR -e GH_AW_SAFE_OUTPUTS -e GH_AW_SAFE_OUTPUTS_CONFIG_PATH -e GH_AW_SAFE_OUTPUTS_TOOLS_PATH -e GH_AW_ASSETS_BRANCH -e GH_AW_ASSETS_MAX_SIZE_KB -e GH_AW_ASSETS_ALLOWED_EXTS -e DEFAULT_BRANCH -e GITHUB_MCP_SERVER_TOKEN -e GITHUB_MCP_LOCKDOWN -e GITHUB_REPOSITORY -e GITHUB_SERVER_URL -e GITHUB_SHA -e GITHUB_WORKSPACE -e GITHUB_TOKEN -e GITHUB_RUN_ID -e GITHUB_RUN_NUMBER -e GITHUB_RUN_ATTEMPT -e GITHUB_JOB -e GITHUB_ACTION -e GITHUB_EVENT_NAME -e GITHUB_EVENT_PATH -e GITHUB_ACTOR -e GITHUB_ACTOR_ID -e GITHUB_TRIGGERING_ACTOR -e GITHUB_WORKFLOW -e GITHUB_WORKFLOW_REF -e GITHUB_WORKFLOW_SHA -e GITHUB_REF -e GITHUB_REF_NAME -e GITHUB_REF_TYPE -e GITHUB_HEAD_REF -e GITHUB_BASE_REF -e GH_AW_SAFE_OUTPUTS_PORT -e GH_AW_SAFE_OUTPUTS_API_KEY -v /tmp/gh-aw/mcp-payloads:/tmp/gh-aw/mcp-payloads:rw -v /opt:/opt:ro -v /tmp:/tmp:rw -v '"${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}"':'"${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}"':rw ghcr.io/github/gh-aw-mcpg:v0.1.5'[0m
